5: This code excerpt illustrates the employment of the LoopAgent within the Google ADK
6: framework to establish iterative workflows. The code defines two agents:
7: ConditionChecker and ProcessingStep. ConditionChecker is a custom agent that
8: checks a "status" value in the session state. If the "status" is "completed",
9: ConditionChecker escalates an event to stop the loop. Otherwise, it yields an event to
10: continue the loop. ProcessingStep is an LlmAgent using the "gemini-2.0-flash-exp"
11: model. Its instruction is to perform a task and set the session "status" to "completed"
12: if it's the final step. A LoopAgent named StatusPoller is created. StatusPoller is
13: configured with max_iterations=10. StatusPoller includes both ProcessingStep and an
14: instance of ConditionChecker as sub-agents. The LoopAgent will execute the
15: sub-agents sequentially for up to 10 iterations, stopping if ConditionChecker finds the
